name: joomla-mcp

scripts.test:tools:menus: npm run build && cross-env TEST_SUITE=menus tsx scripts/tests/mcp-all-tools-test.ts
scripts.test:tools:admin: npm run build && cross-env TEST_SUITE=admin tsx scripts/tests/mcp-all-tools-test.ts
